sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_timestamps(id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, start_time TIMESTAMP, end_time TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_timestamps(start_time, end_time) VALUES (timestamp '2021-12-31 18:40:40', timestamp '2021-02-20 16:30:20');
UPDATE test_timestamps SET end_time = timestamp '2021-11-30 10:00:00' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT timestampdiff_week(start_time, end_time) AS week_difference FROM test_timestamps WHERE id = 1;
